languages.text: "Запрос принят. Функции сектора Бионика полностью восстановлены и управляются данной жизнеформой. Аугментика устанавливается в соответствии с принятыми протоколами".
"Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."

traits.locale_text: "Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."
"Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."
"Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."

languages.text: « Demande acceptée. Le secteur Bionica est de nouveau pleinement opérationnel et placé sous la supervision de cette unité. Les augmétiques sont désormais implantés sur la seule base des protocoles en vigueur. »
languages.original_text: "Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."

traits.locale_text: « Demande acceptée. Le secteur Bionica est de nouveau pleinement opérationnel et placé sous la supervision de cette unité. Les augmétiques sont désormais implantés sur la seule base des protocoles en vigueur. »

languages.text: "Anfrage akzeptiert. Der Sektor Bionica ist wieder voll funktionsfähig und wird von dieser Einheit überwacht. Derzeit werden im Einklang mit autorisierten Protokollen Augmentationen installiert."
languages.original_text: "Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."

traits.locale_text: "Anfrage akzeptiert. Der Sektor Bionica ist wieder voll funktionsfähig und wird von dieser Einheit überwacht. Derzeit werden im Einklang mit autorisierten Protokollen Augmentationen installiert."

languages.text: “请求已接受。仿生区已完全恢复运作，并由本单位监管。植入物正按照核准的协议进行安装。”
languages.original_text: "Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."

traits.locale_text: “请求已接受。仿生区已完全恢复运作，并由本单位监管。植入物正按照核准的协议进行安装。”

languages.text: «Solicitud aceptada. El Sector Bionica está plenamente operativo otra vez bajo la supervisión de esta unidad. Los auméticos están siendo instalados conforme los protocolos aprobados».
languages.original_text: "Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."

traits.locale_text: «Solicitud aceptada. El Sector Bionica está plenamente operativo otra vez bajo la supervisión de esta unidad. Los auméticos están siendo instalados conforme los protocolos aprobados».

languages.text: 「要求を受けました。セクター・ビオニカは再び稼働し、この部隊の監督下に置かれています。承認された手順に従って、拡張機能が設置されています」
languages.original_text: "Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."

languages.text: "Talep kabul edildi. Sektör Biyonika, bu birimin gözetimi altında bir kez daha tam kapasite çalışıyor. Ogmetikler, onaylanmış protokollere uygun olarak kuruluyor."
languages.original_text: "Request accepted. The Sector Bionica is fully operational once more and under the oversight of this life form. Augmetics are being installed in accordance with approved protocols."

traits.locale_text: "Talep kabul edildi. Sektör Biyonika, bu birimin gözetimi altında bir kez daha tam kapasite çalışıyor. Ogmetikler, onaylanmış protokollere uygun olarak kuruluyor."
